stemHtml: Which of the following characteristics is correct when describing compacted snow?

options.a: Compacted slush with a depth of at least 13 mm.
options.b: Snow compressed into a solid mass such that aeroplane tyres will run on it without further compaction of the surface.
options.c: Freshly fallen dry snow with a minimum depth of 50 mm.
options.d: Equivalent to compressed ice crystals which are from airborne moisture on a Surface whose temperature is at or below freezing.
